meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Students: Solve No Version Control with Antigravity Template
content.seo_description: Stop losing code. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to master version control and build professional, scalable SaaS apps.
content.answer_block: Version control is the backbone of professional engineering. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you gain an automated, Git-backed architecture that secures your work, tracks every iteration, and mimics elite industry standards. Pair this with Claude Code to automate commit hygiene and maintain a pristine, production-ready codebase from day one.
content.intro:
You’ve spent hours crafting the perfect logic, only to watch a stray terminal command or a 'final_v2_real.js' mistake destroy your progress. This isn't just a bug; it's the 'no version control' trap that stalls hundreds of student projects before they ever see the light of production. It’s the difference between an amateur hobbyist and a developer ready to ship.

But the tide is turning. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you’re not just saving files; you’re building a professional audit trail that acts as a safety net for your innovation. We’re going to bridge the gap between messy local scripts and a robust, scalable architecture that recruiters actually want to see.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a professional root directory that enforces strict folder separation and Git integration from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity template, ensuring standard directory structure for src, tests, and config, and auto-initialize a .git repository.

steps.title: Configure Atomic Commit Hooks
steps.description: Automate your versioning so that every milestone is captured without manual intervention, preventing code loss.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up pre-commit hooks that validate code style and linting before allowing a commit to the main branch.
steps.claude_code_command: claude config set hooks.pre-commit 'npm run lint && npm test'

steps.title: Implement Branching Strategy
steps.description: Learn to isolate features so that your experimental UI code never breaks your backend logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a branching strategy definition within the Antigravity config that enforces a feature-branch workflow for all new logic.

steps.title: Automate Documentation with Claude
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate meaningful commit messages that explain the 'why' behind your changes, not just the 'what'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current diff and write a conventional commit message following the Angular convention.

steps.title: Finalize Production Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Connect your versioned repository to a deployment pipeline to ensure your app is always ready for a demo.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment configuration file for the Antigravity template that integrates with Vercel or Netlify via Git hooks.

pro_tips: Treat every commit message as a note to your future self; include the 'why' of the decision, not just the code change.
Use Git tags for every major feature milestone to make your portfolio look like a professional production release history.
Never commit API keys or environment variables; use a .gitignore file to keep your secrets out of public view.
Run your test suite before every commit; if the tests fail, the code doesn't get versioned.
Regularly squash your local 'work-in-progress' commits before merging to keep your main branch history clean and readable.
content.next_steps: Once your project is version-controlled, focus on deploying your first MVP to a live URL and documenting your development journey on LinkedIn.
content.conversion_block: You now have the tools to ship professional-grade software that stands out to recruiters and peers alike. Don't let your hard work disappear into the void of local storage. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
